Home.title: Package Sorting Puzzle
Home.description: In this free web game, players sort packages pouring onto a conveyor belt before time runs out.
Home.rotateToPlay: Rotate your device to landscape mode to play

Introduction.title: Introduction | Logistics Center Sorting Simulator
Introduction.heading: Introduction
Introduction.description:
This is a web game where you sort packages on a conveyor belt within a limited time.
Experience the pressure of working at a logistics center and sorting deliveries.
Introduction.group-similar: Place each item into the RT with the matching number.
Introduction.find-number: Click items with hidden numbers (???) to reveal them.
Introduction.change-full-RT: Send away full RTs and replace them with new ones.
Introduction.avoidDroppingItems: Try not to drop any items.

Game.allStagesCleared: You gained experience on every line and managed to avoid getting fired.
Game.stage_clear_5: You've become a worker who won't get fired!!
